description: Beta patch: unify the npm latest dist-tag policy so release preflight checks, upgrade defaults, and published metadata all follow the same latest-only contract.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- fix(release): publish preflight now enforces a latest-only npm dist-tag policy so release checks and registry verification agree on the same contract.
- fix(upgrade): CLI upgrade behavior now aligns with the published latest-only strategy instead of relying on divergent beta/rc defaults.

**Notes:**
- release-related tests and fork specs were updated together so the release pipeline and user-facing upgrade path stay in sync.
notes: Run `npm install -g trellis-hgl@latest` (or install this exact version) and `trellis update` to pick up the release-policy and upgrade-path fixes. No file migration is required.
